list.name: Changes
list.comment:
fix(blog): resolve infinite suspense loop on blog detail page
- Split getPost into a promise-returning getPostPromise + a PostContent component that calls use() inside a Suspense boundary - Added a per-blogId promise cache (postPromiseCache) so the same promise instance is returned across re-renders — previously each render created a new fetchQuery promise, causing use() to suspend indefinitely - Suspense now wraps only PostContent instead of the whole page, so the header/back-arrow renders immediately while the post loads - Old getPost async function left in place for reference, unused

task.summary: Default task
change project dir
change project dir
work space xml
commit 8
commit 9
commit 10
commit 11
add inputs and controllers to create post page
add inputs and controllers to create post page 2
add inputs and controllers to create post page 3
define posts schema
add post (blogArticle) table
add post action
add post action : add async and await
add post action : redirect user to home page
add post function : changed it to server side just for testing

refactor(create-post): move post creation to a server action
- Replace client-side authClient.getSession() in actions.ts with fetchAuthMutation from lib/auth-server, since authClient relies on relative URLs that only resolve in the browser and crash on the server - Let the Convex posts.createPost mutation be the single source of truth for the auth check (authComponent.safeGetAuthUser) instead of duplicating it in the server action - Add revalidatePath('/') to invalidate the stale homepage cache after a new post is created - Add redirect('/') to navigate the user after a successful post, replacing the client-side router.push('/') - Handle redirect's internal NEXT_REDIRECT throw correctly on the client using unstable_rethrow, so it isn't caught as an app error - Wrap the submit handler in startTransition with try/catch for proper pending state and error toasts

refactor(posts): standardize on server actions, add blog listing
- Rename createPost -> createPostAction for clarity, drop unused Convex useMutation hook from create/page.tsx (server action was already handling the mutation) - Remove unused app/api/create-blog/route.ts (dead route handler, never called) - Add convex/posts.ts getPosts query and wire it into blog/page.tsx via fetchQuery (server component, no client fetch) - revalidatePath('/blog') after createPostAction so new posts show up immediately
blog function : added card and images just for testing
blog loading - server side : handle delay from server by using Suspense react component

fix(blog): correct dark mode text contrast on blog page
- Replace text-chart-5 with text-foreground for h1 (was invisible in dark mode, same value as --background) - Replace text-muted with text-muted-foreground for subtitle paragraph (was invisible in dark mode, same value as --background)

feat(posts): add image upload via Convex file storage
- Add generateUploadUrl mutation to request a short-lived upload URL from Convex storage (auth-gated, same pattern as createPost) - Change createPost to accept an optional storageId instead of a raw image string; resolves it to a public URL via ctx.storage.getUrl() before inserting, so posts without an image stay undefined - Make posts.image optional in schema.ts to match (old docs and image-less posts no longer fail schema validation) - Wire the create-post form to the real upload flow: on submit, POST the selected file to the generated upload URL, get back a storageId, then pass it to createPostAction alongside the form values - Drop the dead image field from postSchema (was unused/mismatched with the actual upload flow) and unused router/useMutation leftovers in create/page.tsx - Configure next.config.ts images.remotePatterns to allow the Convex storage domain, fixing "hostname not configured" on next/image - Fall back to /article.png in blog page + ExpandableProfileCard when a post has no image
blog page : add see more to view blog details using ID ---- step 1
blog page : add see more to view blog details using ID ---- step 2
blog page : add see more to view blog details using ID ---- step 3

fix(blog): resolve infinite suspense loop on blog detail page
- Split getPost into a promise-returning getPostPromise + a PostContent component that calls use() inside a Suspense boundary - Added a per-blogId promise cache (postPromiseCache) so the same promise instance is returned across re-renders — previously each render created a new fetchQuery promise, causing use() to suspend indefinitely - Suspense now wraps only PostContent instead of the whole page, so the header/back-arrow renders immediately while the post loads - Old getPost async function left in place for reference, unused

MESSAGE.value: change project dir
work space xml
commit 8
commit 9
commit 10
commit 11
add inputs and controllers to create post page
add inputs and controllers to create post page 2
add inputs and controllers to create post page 3
define posts schema
add post (blogArticle) table
add post action
add post action : add async and await
add post action : redirect user to home page
add post function : changed it to server side just for testing

refactor(create-post): move post creation to a server action
- Replace client-side authClient.getSession() in actions.ts with fetchAuthMutation from lib/auth-server, since authClient relies on relative URLs that only resolve in the browser and crash on the server - Let the Convex posts.createPost mutation be the single source of truth for the auth check (authComponent.safeGetAuthUser) instead of duplicating it in the server action - Add revalidatePath('/') to invalidate the stale homepage cache after a new post is created - Add redirect('/') to navigate the user after a successful post, replacing the client-side router.push('/') - Handle redirect's internal NEXT_REDIRECT throw correctly on the client using unstable_rethrow, so it isn't caught as an app error - Wrap the submit handler in startTransition with try/catch for proper pending state and error toasts

refactor(posts): standardize on server actions, add blog listing
- Rename createPost -> createPostAction for clarity, drop unused Convex useMutation hook from create/page.tsx (server action was already handling the mutation) - Remove unused app/api/create-blog/route.ts (dead route handler, never called) - Add convex/posts.ts getPosts query and wire it into blog/page.tsx via fetchQuery (server component, no client fetch) - revalidatePath('/blog') after createPostAction so new posts show up immediately
blog function : added card and images just for testing
blog loading - server side : handle delay from server by using Suspense react component

fix(blog): correct dark mode text contrast on blog page
- Replace text-chart-5 with text-foreground for h1 (was invisible in dark mode, same value as --background) - Replace text-muted with text-muted-foreground for subtitle paragraph (was invisible in dark mode, same value as --background)

feat(posts): add image upload via Convex file storage
- Add generateUploadUrl mutation to request a short-lived upload URL from Convex storage (auth-gated, same pattern as createPost) - Change createPost to accept an optional storageId instead of a raw image string; resolves it to a public URL via ctx.storage.getUrl() before inserting, so posts without an image stay undefined - Make posts.image optional in schema.ts to match (old docs and image-less posts no longer fail schema validation) - Wire the create-post form to the real upload flow: on submit, POST the selected file to the generated upload URL, get back a storageId, then pass it to createPostAction alongside the form values - Drop the dead image field from postSchema (was unused/mismatched with the actual upload flow) and unused router/useMutation leftovers in create/page.tsx - Configure next.config.ts images.remotePatterns to allow the Convex storage domain, fixing "hostname not configured" on next/image - Fall back to /article.png in blog page + ExpandableProfileCard when a post has no image
blog page : add see more to view blog details using ID ---- step 1
blog page : add see more to view blog details using ID ---- step 2
blog page : add see more to view blog details using ID ---- step 3

fix(blog): resolve infinite suspense loop on blog detail page
- Split getPost into a promise-returning getPostPromise + a PostContent component that calls use() inside a Suspense boundary - Added a per-blogId promise cache (postPromiseCache) so the same promise instance is returned across re-renders — previously each render created a new fetchQuery promise, causing use() to suspend indefinitely - Suspense now wraps only PostContent instead of the whole page, so the header/back-arrow renders immediately while the post loads - Old getPost async function left in place for reference, unused

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
fix(blog): resolve infinite suspense loop on blog detail page
- Split getPost into a promise-returning getPostPromise + a PostContent component that calls use() inside a Suspense boundary - Added a per-blogId promise cache (postPromiseCache) so the same promise instance is returned across re-renders — previously each render created a new fetchQuery promise, causing use() to suspend indefinitely - Suspense now wraps only PostContent instead of the whole page, so the header/back-arrow renders immediately while the post loads - Old getPost async function left in place for reference, unused
